text:
Transfer of car

The [applicant] / [respondent] shall transfer to the [respondent] / [applicant] all [his] / [her] interest in the family car for [her] / [his] use for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family [on [date]] / [within [number] days of the date of this order] [by [time] on the date [number] days after the date of this order]. The [respondent] / [applicant] shall be responsible for the costs of running and maintaining the family car.

Transfer of life policy

The [applicant] / [respondent] shall transfer [by [time] on [date]] / [by [time] on the date [number] days after the date of this order] / [by [time] on the date [[number] days after the date] of completion of the sale of [insert] referred to at paragraph [para number] [above] / [below]], by [assigning] / [joining in an assignment] to the [respondent] / [applicant] for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family [his] / [her] interest in the life assurance policy with [company name].

Child periodical payments order – Interim order pending CMS calculation

[By agreement between the parties] the [respondent] / [applicant] shall pay to the [applicant] / [respondent] periodical payments for benefit of the child[ren] of the family. Payments shall be at the rate of £[amount] per annum [per child], payable [weekly] / [monthly] [in advance] / [in arrears] by standing order. Payments shall start on [date], and shall end on the issue of a CMS calculation. [Payments made under this paragraph shall be received by the [applicant] / [respondent] on account of any payments that may be due under the CMS calculation.]

Child periodical payments order

[By agreement between the parties] the [respondent] / [applicant] shall pay to the [applicant] / [respondent] periodical payments for benefit of the child[ren] of the family. Payments shall be at the rate of £[amount] per annum [per child], payable [weekly] / [monthly] [in advance] / [in arrears] by standing order. Payments shall start on [date], and shall end on:
